name: nvidia-curated
description: Curated NVIDIA agent-skill plugins for Claude Code — GPU-accelerated tooling and workflows for NVIDIA SDKs.

plugins.name: cuopt
plugins.description: GPU-accelerated optimization with NVIDIA cuOpt — vehicle routing, linear programming, mixed-integer programming, and quadratic programming.

plugins.name: nemoclaw
plugins.description: NemoClaw user workflows — install, configure, deploy, and operate NemoClaw sandboxes for agentic AI with policy, security, inference, and monitoring controls.

plugins.name: physical-ai
plugins.description: Physical AI workflows for video analytics and perception — Video Search and Summarization (VSS) plus DeepStream — to deploy, search, summarize, alert, and report over real-world video.
